analyst_note: Universal Registration Document. SBTi-validated 2030 net-zero trajectory across Scopes 1-3 with reported progress; only verification rated MED (climate-data assurance not clearly evidenced in the extract).

specificity.reasoning: Specific, near-dated net-zero commitment via the Act4Good strategy.

metric.quote: helped reduce scopes 1 and 2 carbon emissions intensity by 9%
metric.reasoning: SBTi-validated decarbonisation trajectory with reported quantified progress.

target.quote: SBTi-validated decarbonization trajectory for Scopes 1, 2 & 3 by 2030
target.reasoning: SBTi-validated trajectory; the report states Klepierre exceeds its SBTi-approved target.

time_horizon.reasoning: Net-zero endpoint set at 2030 — near-dated and verifiable rather than long-deferred.

scope.quote: SBTi-validated decarbonization trajectory for Scopes 1, 2 & 3 by 2030
scope.reasoning: Scopes 1, 2 and 3 covered by the validated trajectory.

verification.value: operational audits shown; climate-data assurance not evidenced
verification.reasoning: The extract evidences operational third-party audits but not a clear external assurance statement on the climate/emissions disclosures.

consistency.quote: Klepierre maintains a disciplined, accretive approach to capital allocation
consistency.reasoning: Capital allocation and EPRA capex disclosed; no contradiction with the net-zero strategy surfaced.
